description: handlePaymentCompleted lacked tenantId parameter, allowing cross-tenant webhook processing
fix: Added tenantId parameter to method signature and all call sites (service spec + stripe-webhook spec)

description: No Prometheus counter for payment link creation events
fix: Added paymentLinksTotal Counter to MetricsService and injected MetricsService into PaymentLinkService; counter incremented with channel+status labels on createPaymentLink

description: Stripe SDK initialized without network retry configuration
fix: Added maxNetworkRetries: 2 to Stripe constructor options (PCI DSS-aligned, handles transient network failures)

description: Lines 12-15,24-30,33: TypeScript/NestJS IIFE artifacts from @Injectable(), class-validator decorators — __decorate/__metadata branches unreachable at runtime
Line 20: NestJS @Controller/@Get decorator IIFE — branch unreachable
Line 22: NestJS decorator IIFE — branch unreachable
Lines 14-15,17,24-27: class-validator @IsEnum/@IsString decorator IIFEs — __decorate/__metadata branches unreachable
Public endpoint resolvePaymentToken (no auth guard) is intentional — portal page for payers; tenantId isolation enforced via paymentLinkId token scoping inside service

invoice.update() uses PK id without tenantId in where clause — safe because the invoice.id was obtained from a prior findFirst({id, tenantId}) lookup in same method; tenant ownership verified before update
